rationale_source: F1.PV docs-tier (appraisal) wins when broker tiers are empty; LIST-C-A14-RESOLVED (BATCH 14) — terse refi without explicit payout language escalates per Q1/Finding-1b, now surfaced by Bug-3 loan extraction.

workflow_state.rationale: LIST-C-A14-RESOLVED (BATCH 14): A14 is a terse refinance with NO explicit payout language → Q1's R11-B-3 payout carve-out correctly does not fire → combined LTV (existing 1st + new / value) escalates for clarification (Q1 e8975be / Finding-1b). Pre-Bug-3 the null loan amount MASKED this (it processed as 'active'); Bug-3 (d76e02b) now extracts the loan → the genuine Q1 escalation surfaces. BATCH-13 confirmed: dealStatus=awaiting_collateral, broker collateral-ask fired, no admin prelim.

outbound_emails.rationale: Escalation (awaiting_collateral) suppresses the admin prelim — Vienna asks the broker the collateral question first (Fix 7). No Snapshot renders on this path, so the appraisal property_value ($815k) is persisted in extracted_data (secondary surface) but is NOT render-observable — asserting it via the absent prelim Snapshot would be a synthesized-unreachable-surface error (verification-surface discipline: assert what Vienna DOES produce on the escalation path).

must_include.rationale: High-LTV escalation asks the broker the collateral question (markers.collateral_ask confirmed in BATCH-13).
